pi_items.source: Cross-referenced with mixing_notes.txt embedded in setup_task.sh (lines 198-202) and task description. Both sources specify the same two bus names.

Cross-referenced with mixing_notes.txt BUS ROUTING section and task description. Verified session XML shows 4 tracks (Host, Guest, Music_Bed, SFX) all initially routing to Master (system:playback). Agent must reroute to buses.
mixing_notes.txt GAIN & PAN table: 'Host 0 Center'. 0 dB = linear gain 1.0 in Ardour XML.
mixing_notes.txt: 'Guest -3 25% Right'. -3 dB = linear 0.707946 in Ardour XML.
mixing_notes.txt: 'Music_Bed -14 Center'. -14 dB = linear 0.199526 in Ardour XML.
mixing_notes.txt: 'SFX -8 100% Left (hard left)'. -8 dB = linear 0.398107 in Ardour XML.
mixing_notes.txt: 'Dialogue_Stem -1 Center (default)'. -1 dB = linear 0.891251 in Ardour XML.
mixing_notes.txt: 'Music_Stem -6 Center (default)'. -6 dB = linear 0.501187 in Ardour XML.
mixing_notes.txt says '25% Right'. Ardour pan-azimuth: 0.0=hard left, 0.5=center, 1.0=hard right. 25% right from center = 0.5 + 0.25*(1.0-0.5) = 0.625. Computation verified.
mixing_notes.txt says '100% Left (hard left)'. Ardour pan-azimuth 0.0 = hard left. Verified.
Standard tolerance for DAW gain matching. Consistent with session_bus_routing task which uses identical 1.5 dB tolerance. Reasonable for both drag-based and numeric fader entry.
10% pan position tolerance on 0.0-1.0 scale. Reasonable for pan knob dragging. Consistent with other Ardour tasks.
mixing_notes.txt MUSIC DUCKING AUTOMATION section: 'Draw gain automation on Music_Bed to duck under dialogue'. Matches session XML track name 'Music_Bed'.

mixing_notes.txt MUSIC DUCKING AUTOMATION table specifies exactly these 6 points. All timestamps fall within the 30s session range (max point at 26s < 30s). The pattern represents two dialogue segments (0-14s and 16-26s) with music ducking from 0dB to -18dB during each.
Reasonable tolerance for manual automation point placement. Allows ±1.5 seconds from specified time positions.
Reasonable tolerance for automation point gain values. ±3 dB allows for visual drag imprecision on the automation lane.
mixing_notes.txt: 'Cold_Open 0:00'. At 44100 Hz, 0:00 = 0 samples. Computation: 0 * 44100 = 0.
mixing_notes.txt: 'Interview_Start 0:05'. At 44100 Hz, 5 seconds = 5 * 44100 = 220500 samples. Verified by computation.
mixing_notes.txt: 'Deep_Dive 0:14'. At 44100 Hz, 14 seconds = 14 * 44100 = 617400 samples. Verified by computation.
mixing_notes.txt: 'Outro 0:26'. At 44100 Hz, 26 seconds = 26 * 44100 = 1146600 samples. Verified by computation.
88200 samples at 44100 Hz = 2.0 seconds. Verified by computation. Reasonable tolerance for manual marker placement in the timeline.
Verified directory exists in live environment with correct ownership (ga:ga) and permissions (755). See evidence file 06_delivery_dir_permissions.txt.
mixing_notes.txt STEM DELIVERY section specifies these exact 3 filenames. Cross-referenced with task description.
mixing_notes.txt ARCHIVE section: 'Save a session snapshot named "EP12_Final_Mix"'. Cross-referenced with task description. Snapshot dialog confirmed accessible (see evidence 19_snapshot_dialog.png).
Task design parameter. 55/100 means agent must complete at least routing(25) + gain/pan(20) + one more partial criterion. Reasonable for a very_hard task.

privileged_info_summary: This is a podcast stem delivery task in Ardour 6.9.0. The session starts with 4 empty named tracks (Host, Guest, Music_Bed, SFX) that initially route to Master. Audio files are in the session's interchange/MyProject/audiofiles/ directory: host_narration.wav, guest_interview.wav, music_bed.wav, sfx_hits.wav (all stereo, 44100 Hz, 30 seconds). The agent must import audio onto each track, then create two stereo buses named exactly 'Dialogue_Stem' and 'Music_Stem'. Host and Guest route to Dialogue_Stem; Music_Bed and SFX route to Music_Stem. Direct-to-Master connections from all 4 source tracks must be removed. Gain values: Host=0dB (unity), Guest=-3dB, Music_Bed=-14dB, SFX=-8dB, Dialogue_Stem=-1dB, Music_Stem=-6dB. Pan: Guest=25% right (Ardour azimuth 0.625), SFX=hard left (azimuth 0.0), all others center. Music_Bed needs gain automation with 6 breakpoints forming a ducking pattern: 0s/0dB, 2s/-18dB, 12s/-18dB, 14s/0dB, 16s/-18dB, 26s/0dB. Four location markers: Cold_Open at 0:00 (sample 0), Interview_Start at 0:05 (sample 220500), Deep_Dive at 0:14 (sample 617400), Outro at 0:26 (sample 1146600). Three WAV files must be exported to /home/ga/Audio/podcast_delivery/: dialogue_stem.wav (Dialogue_Stem bus only), music_stem.wav (Music_Stem bus only), full_mix.wav (full session/Master). All exports 16-bit 44.1kHz stereo WAV. Finally, save a session snapshot named 'EP12_Final_Mix'. The mixing_notes.txt file on the Desktop contains all specifications. Tolerances: gain ±1.5dB, pan ±0.1, automation time ±1.5s, automation gain ±3dB, markers ±88200 samples (2 seconds).
